infos.name: 阳台
infos.desc:
You arrive in a 阳台. An ordinary one. You try to gain information on your surroundings by using a technique you call 'looking.'



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going south. You need an unguarded exit? You should try going west.

infos.name: 厨房
infos.desc:
You've just shown up in a 厨房. The room seems oddly familiar, as though it were only superficially different from the other rooms in the building.



You need an unblocked exit? You should try going east. There is an exit to the south. Don't worry, it is unblocked.

infos.name: 客厅
infos.desc:
You've entered a 客厅.



There is an exit to the north. Don't worry, it is unguarded. You don't like doors? Why not try going west, that entranceway is unguarded.

infos.name: 卧室
infos.desc:
You find yourself in a 卧室. A normal one.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going east. You need an unguarded exit? You should try going north.

infos.name: hazard variant 1
infos.desc: The hazard variant 1 appears to be to fit in here

infos.name: hazard variant 15
infos.desc: The hazard variant 15 seems well matched to everything else here

infos.name: blocked exit boxes
infos.desc: The blocked exit boxes is expensive looking.

infos.name: hazard variant 12
infos.desc: The hazard variant 12 would seem to be to fit in here

infos.name: open gas valve
infos.desc: The open gas valve looks out of place here

objective: 处理以下火灾隐患：未熄灭的蜡烛、电热毯未关、安全出口灯损坏、逃生通道堆满纸箱、插座进水、充电器压在枕头下、燃气阀门未关、灶台油污
